contact.metadataDescription: Get in touch with the Kliekjesclub team.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.subheading: Questions, feedback, or an idea? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.emailBody: The fastest way to reach us is by email. We aim to reply within two working days.
contact.faqBody: A lot of questions are already answered in our FAQ. Check there first — your answer may already be there.
contact.aboutBody: We're a Dutch initiative fighting food waste by making leftovers from home kitchens and restaurants available to neighbours.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist (anymore).

impact.metadataDescription: See how much food Kliekjesclub has helped save over the past period.
impact.heading: Together we make an impact
impact.subheading: Every leftover shared is less food wasted.
impact.methodBody: We estimate using Dutch averages: ≈ 1.25 kg CO₂ equivalent and 1,000 liters of water per meal. Figures are updated daily based on picked-up reservations.
